svg.text: LLM Fleet Planner — VRAM @ max ctx (RX 7900 XT · 20 GiB · Vulkan)
Card 20.0 GB · one row per quant×mode (VRAM/ctx is quant-determined; think vs no-think differ only in quality) · fit× = card ÷ footprint · ★★★★★ = top-5 overall (gold = rank)
Per-model footprint & memory efficiency at max ctx
Best single-model setups — weights ONCE, main @ max ctx + scratchpad · 1full+64k = 1 lead @max + N×64k workers (REQUIRES --parallel + --kv-unified)
